series_metadata.series_title: FORMULARY ESTABLISHED BY COMMITTEE ON PRESCRIPTIVE GOVERNANCE
series_metadata.series_description: The formulary established by the Board Committee on Prescriptive Governance which must be posted on the Board website according to OAC 4723-9-10.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: past editions of formulary permanently at Board office. ; Electronic: current formulary on Board website. past editions of formulary permanently at Board office
